title: DomainModule
description: Pluggable science domain module contract — domain-agnostic interface for DomainRegistry (Execution_Plan_Phase0.md §2.2)

domain_id.description: Unique domain identifier — snake_case, lowercase only

description.description: Brief description of the scientific domain

supported_data_types.description: Data types this domain can process (e.g. ['mass_spec', 'dsc_thermal'])

methods.description: Computational methods provided by this domain

assumption_ontology.description: Domain-specific assumption vocabulary — must not bleed into Core/framework

validity_scopes.description: Validity scope identifiers this domain declares

signed.description: Whether this module artifact has been signed — required for production activation

method_id.description: Unique method identifier within the domain

domain_id.description: Parent domain identifier — must match DomainModule.domain_id

required_data_types.description: Data types this method requires as input

required_assumptions.description: Assumption IDs from assumption_ontology that must be declared

produces_uncertainty.description: Must always be true — P4: uncertainty is mandatory

produces_validity_scope.description: Must always be true — P5: validity domain is mandatory

compute_class.description: Compute substrate class for this method

parameters_schema.description: JSON Schema for method parameters — validated at invocation

QuantumContract.description: Quantum extension — required when compute_class contains quantum (Step9 §9.7.5)

classical_baseline_required.description: Classical baseline must exist before quantum path reaches Endorsable

problem_formulation.description: How the scientific problem maps to quantum formulation (QUBO, Hamiltonian, etc.)

semantic_loss_disclosure.description: Known semantic loss in problem-to-circuit translation
